coping_techniques.name: 4-7-8 Breathing Technique
steps: Find a comfortable position, sitting or lying down
Place the tip of your tongue behind your upper front teeth
Breathe in quietly through your nose for 4 seconds
Exhale completely through your mouth for 8 seconds
cautions: May feel lightheaded at first - this is normal
Start with 1-2 cycles if new to breathing exercises

coping_techniques.name: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding Technique
steps: Acknowledge 5 things you can SEE around you
